definition: A small furry animal often kept as a pet.
sentence_context: The cat chased the laser pointer across the floor.

definition: A common pet that barks and wags its tail.
sentence_context: I take my dog for a walk every morning.

definition: A wooden stick used for hitting a ball.
sentence_context: He swung the bat and hit a home run.

definition: The star at the center of our solar system.
sentence_context: The sun is very bright today.

definition: A small bowl-shaped container for drinking.
sentence_context: She drank a cup of water.

definition: An instrument for writing with ink.
sentence_context: I used a blue pen to sign the paper.

definition: A covering for the head.
sentence_context: Put on your hat before going outside.

definition: A container with flat sides.
sentence_context: We put the toys in a cardboard box.

definition: A pink animal that lives on a farm.
sentence_context: The pig rolled in the mud.

definition: A device that creates a current of air.
sentence_context: Turn on the fan to cool down the room.

definition: The color of blood or a tomato.
sentence_context: My favorite color is red.

definition: The number after nine.
sentence_context: I have ten fingers.

definition: A thick piece of wood from a tree.
sentence_context: We put another log on the fire.

definition: Soft, wet earth.
sentence_context: The children got stuck in the mud.

definition: A hard-shelled fruit or seed.
sentence_context: The squirrel hid a nut in the ground.

definition: A tiny insect that lives in a colony.
sentence_context: An ant was carrying a crumb of bread.

definition: A piece of furniture for sleeping.
sentence_context: It is time to go to bed.

definition: To move quickly on foot.
sentence_context: I like to run in the park.

definition: To rest on your bottom.
sentence_context: Please sit down in your chair.

definition: To jump on one foot.
sentence_context: The rabbit likes to hop around.

definition: A drawing of an area or country.
sentence_context: We used a map to find the treasure.

definition: A mesh of wire or thread.
sentence_context: He caught a butterfly in his net.

definition: A round container used for cooking.
sentence_context: Mom put the soup in a large pot.

definition: A floor covering.
sentence_context: The cat is sleeping on the rug.

definition: A large container for bathing.
sentence_context: Fill the tub with warm water.

definition: A large vehicle used for moving things.
sentence_context: We loaded the boxes into the van.

definition: A net made by a spider.
sentence_context: There is a spider web in the corner.

definition: A large animal with long hair.
sentence_context: A yak lives in the cold mountains.

definition: To fasten with a zipper.
sentence_context: Can you help me zip my coat?

definition: A sweet spread made from fruit.
sentence_context: I like strawberry jam on my toast.

definition: A small green animal that hops.
sentence_context: The frog jumped into the pond.

definition: To push yourself off the ground.
sentence_context: How high can you jump?

definition: A table used for working or writing.
sentence_context: I keep my books on my desk.

definition: A bright point in the night sky.
sentence_context: I saw a shooting star last night.

definition: A white liquid from cows.
sentence_context: I drink a glass of milk with breakfast.

definition: An animal that lives in water.
sentence_context: The fish swam through the coral.

definition: A device that produces light.
sentence_context: Turn on the lamp so we can see.

definition: A tall plant with a trunk and branches.
sentence_context: The apple tree is full of fruit.

definition: A large motor vehicle carrying passengers.
sentence_context: I take the bus to school.

definition: A small insect.
sentence_context: A tiny bug crawled on the leaf.
